Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x9F22 "PUNCHY-9000-9F22" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $9000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Punchy.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $9000 which sets the pointers to the beginning of the BASIC ($2B/$2C) and variable areas ($2D/$2E).
The loading screen is from the Spectrum version
